untranslatable_reason: Tick direction state (uptick, downtick, zero-tick variants) is not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal requires tracking tick classification (non_uptick, non_downtick, zero-uptick, zero-downtick) which requires historical tick-by-tick data and tick direction logic not present in standard OHLCV indicators. Additionally, 'dynamic limit price adjustment on every tick' cannot be expressed with the allowed operators and indicators.
translation_notes: Signal requires tick-by-tick data and tick direction classification unavailable in standard candlestick indicators. The entry conditions reference specific tick types that would need a tick_direction indicator or similar market microstructure data. Exit condition interpreted as single-bar reversal (price crossing previous close).
